title: AXValidationService
description: Service class for managing validation rules, executing validations, and providing validation results.

types.title: AXValidationService
types.description: Service to execute validation by rule name and to build validation chains.

methods.name: validate(ruleName: string, value: unknown, options?: AXValidationRuleOptions)
methods.description: Validates a value using the specified rule. Returns an AXValidationRuleResult.

methods.name: ruleFor(value: unknown)
methods.description: Starts a rule chain for the given value. Returns AXValidationRuleChain.
